parameters.query: SELECT p.id, p.user_id, p.symbol, p.target_price, p.current_price_at_prediction, p.direction, p.predicted_probability, p.predicted_timeframe_min, p.predicted_timeframe_max, p.created_at, u.alerts_chat_id, u.private_chat_id FROM predictions p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id WHERE p.status = 'pending' AND u.is_active = true
UPDATE predictions SET status = $1, actual_hit = $2, actual_hit_date = CASE WHEN $2 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, actual_sessions_taken = $3, accuracy_score = $4 WHERE id = $5
